titleStmt.title: SII 24.65: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 65. (A.R. No. 118 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of tax-free dēvadāna land in Viḷattūr-nāḍu in Kēraḷāntakavaḷanāḍu to Poṉpaṟṟi-uḍaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Sēñaṉ alias Rājēndrachōḻa Adiyamān of Tirumiḻalaikkūṟṟam in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Rājarājap-Pāṇḍināḍu by the executives of the temple on the orders of Vīra Vichchādira-Mūvēndavēḷār the Śrīkāryam officer of the temple, stipulating that the endowed land be named Tirumallināḍi-viḷāgam and a specified quantity of paddy measured to the temple. Dated in the 20th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponṉemiyaḷavu n=tanṉemi naṭappa ṅku jeyamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayiṟmuṉaik kon=taḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḻvali kāṭṭi porpari naṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappā ntu
punitaṟ tirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi tanṉaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat toṉ nila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticai toruñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilavaḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiruniḻal veṇ ṇilāttikaḻa Oru tani meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattu pūpāla[ r tiṟai viṭutan=ta] kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavan karun=talai paru- n=talaittiṭat taṉ ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa pinṉāḷ piṟkula ye
ṉṉūñ colletirkoṭiṟ ṟallatu taṉkai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa taṉ mānamum kūṟina vīramum kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirit talamarak kuṭaticai tanṉāḷukantu tānun tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapala mutukum payantetir mā vum
paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇa venṉim pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicai kaik koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum poru parittalaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal teṉ kaṭal pāyvatu polat taṉ peruñ ceṉaiyai Ēvip pa
ñcavaraivar poruta veñci markkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nā ṟṟaveñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijeyastampam Eḻil peṟa niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiḻp potiyilum matta veṅkaripaṭum jayappūṅ kanṉiyum koṇṭu tennāṭṭil talaikā kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya taṉ varuparittalaivarai kurukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāruṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilai
kaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟai koḷḷa vīrasiṅhāsana ntiriyaviṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷiyāramu n=tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola vīramum tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar viḷaṅka viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripaṟmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kolot tuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu tiruvaraṅkattu Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Eḻuttu Ivvāḻvānukku śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa Atikārikaḷ viraviccātira muventa veḷār Ōlaipaṭi śrīvayiṣṇavavāri
yam Eṭṭukkūrt tiruna pānampiyum perumpuliyūr cakkarapāṇinampiyum perumpaṟṟap m perumpuliyūr tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyānampiyum nampūr nārāyaṇanampiyum Irāyūrt tiruvaraṅkamāḷinampiyum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa Aṟayarum muṅkilkuṭi makiḻalaṅkāradāsarum Aru kaṇṭarnampiyum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān cirāmanum Āritan kurukai kāvalan Ārāvamutum Āritan kecu
van taniiḷañciṅkamum n kecuvan Aṟivariyānum pāratāyan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa ratāya pāratāyan kūttan tiruveṅkaṭamum kāśyapan cilakan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum mutal kaṇakku Uṟaiyūruṭaiyān tiruvāṉaikkāvaṟ periyānāna karuṇākarap piriyanum śrīvayiṣṇavakkaṇakku mayilāppu tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyānum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom rājarājappāṇṭināṭṭu rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirumiḻalaikkūṟṟattu pon
paṟṟiyuṭaiyān Araiyan ceñanāna rāje(ntra)coḻa Atiyamānukku nāṅkaḷ ḷaṭuttuk kuṭuttanilamāvatu keraḷān=takavaḷanāṭṭu viṉtayār nāṭṭu Āḻvār tevatānamāna taṇṭuṟaiyiluṅ kāraikkuṭiyilum Āṟuṭaintu maṇaliṭāppayirc cey Uṇṇāte kiṭan=ta nilattil kiḻpāṟkellai jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻa viḷākattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻaviḷākattukkum cāttakuṭi vākkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai
viṣṇupaṭṭan viḷākattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻavākkāṉukkut teṟkum Āka Icain=ta perunānkellaiyil naṭuvakappaṭṭa nilam Araiye Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum Innamiṅke maṇaliṭāyp payirceyya Uṇṇātu kiṭanta Ivanukku Ittuk kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai taṇṭuṟaiyuṅ kāraikkuṭiyum nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavākkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai taṇṭuṟaiyuṅ kaāraikkuṭiyum nilattukku kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai taṇṭuṟaiyuṅ kāraikkuṭiyum nilattukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Eḻumā mukkāṇiyum mun cernta taṭi nilam Araiye Iraṇṭumākkāṇiyum Āka nilam veli Innilam velikkum vilaiyāka Āḻvār śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkina kācu Onṟu Ikkācu Onṟum Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu Innilam Ivanukku Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Āḻvārkanmikaḷom Innilam Iraṇṭu taṭikkum tirumalli nāṭiviḷāka menṟu porvatākavum Itti
rumallināṭi viḷākamenṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam veliyum tirutti tān veṇṭu payir ceytu viḷañca nilattāl puncey varicai veli Onṟukku paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl nellu Eṇkalamāka Innilam velikkum Eṇkalanellu Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum kovilile Aḷakka kaṭavanākavum Innilattukku Innellu pokki svāmi pokattu mikutiyāna nellu tirumallināṭi tirunaṉtavanam ceyvār taṅkaḷukku koṟṟukkum piṭavai mutalukkuṅ koṇṭu Itti
runantavanattukku veṇṭum paṇiceytu kaḻukū vilāvum Uḷḷiṭṭa maram Iṭṭākki ceṇpakamum catapattiyum karumukaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa tirupaḻamaramum Iṭṭākki nittamum tiru kaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikkut tirunantavanam ceyya velic ceyyum Anupavikka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivvelic ceyyum kaṭamai Aṭṭi Ippaṭi Anupavikku miṭattu Ituvallatu Innilattukku Iṟaiyum veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai teṟum ceyyakkaṭavataContinuation not traceable.—
Digital edition of SII 24.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
